claimReviewNotes: Visible claims are inherited from the operator-approved PoleFlyerMallFlyer.png reference.

Known visible claims include Locally Controlled, No Mandatory Monthly Contracts, Custom Security Systems, Cameras, Alarms, Smart Automation, Buffalo Built, Western New York, Privacy Focused, No Cloud Required, Built For Real Life, You Own. You Control., and Scan For Free Estimate.
No Cloud Required and You Own. You Control. require operator verification against the actual deployed offer before bulk production.

If those claims are not universally accurate, a future revision task should soften them to safer language such as Local Control Options, Cloud-Light Options, Privacy-Focused Options, Designed Around Your Control, or Ownership-Focused Systems.
